mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.orderNo END) AS paid, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'READY' THEN o.orderNo END) AS ready, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCEL_REQUESTED' THEN o.orderNo END) AS cancelRequested, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'EXCHANGE_REQUESTED' THEN o.orderNo END) AS exchangeRequested, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' THEN o.orderNo END) AS returnRequested FROM `order` o
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.orderNo = o.orderNo AND oi.sellerUid = #{sellerUid} )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayOrderCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayOrderCount, SUM(o.orderTotal) AS totalOrderAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') THEN o.orderTotal ELSE 0 END) AS todayOrderAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(o.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN o.orderTotal ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayOrderAmount FROM `order` o
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.orderNo = o.orderNo AND oi.sellerUid = #{sellerUid} )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalJoinCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(m.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayJoinCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(m.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayJoinCount FROM member m

SELECT SUM(p.hit) AS totalHit FROM product p
p.sellerUid = #{sellerUid}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalInquiryCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(b.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayInquiryCount, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(b.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayInquiryCount FROM board b WHERE b.boardType LIKE 'qna%'
SELECT boardNo, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(boardType, '/', 2), '/', -1) AS category, title, memberUid, createdAt FROM board WHERE boardType LIKE 'notice/%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT boardNo, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(boardType, '/', 2), '/', -1) AS category, title, memberUid, createdAt FROM board WHERE boardType LIKE 'qna/%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS saleDate, top.cateId AS cateId, top.name AS cateName, SUM(oi.total) AS amount FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON oi.orderNo = o.orderNo JOIN product_variant pv ON oi.prodVariantId = pv.id JOIN product p ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo JOIN category c ON p.cateId = c.cateId JOIN category top ON top.cateId = COALESCE(c.parentId, c.cateId)
o.createdAt >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 4 DAY AND o.createdAt < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
AND oi.sellerUid = #{sellerUid}
GROUP BY saleDate, top.cateId, top.name ORDER BY saleDate ASC
